reviews.review_title: No grab to move or scale?
reviews.review_description: It's awesome except that you have to click menus to move, rotate, scale... this is VR why can't you just grab an object and position where you want? Look at how gravity sketch does it. Blows my mind this wasn't the first thing that was built in.

reviews.review_title: What I have been looking for a long time
reviews.review_description:
Love the app.
Nice and easy way to get your glb models shown in VR/XR.
Have your glb file embedded with your PBR material textures and whey are ready to be shown on your stand alone VR headset in no time.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words. This keeps me motivated.
